name: The many uses of magic in the bedroom
description:
Frilly Hopscotch (21, Gnome)

Raleth Everbloom (314, High Elf)

Theo Hagenwald (42, Human)

Laney Dewscale (19, Lizardwoman)

Magic is a wondrous thing. It can move mountains, scorch forests, shake the earth and pierce the heavens. But how can we use it for sex?

Is probably what some scholars asked when they assigned you a special task to figure out how to make the bedroom more exciting. You and one of your assistants (and willing test subjects) has been given your very own lab and tons of magical scrolls to figure out how to use spells to make sex more spicy. Duplication, enlargement, sensual enhancements, magical vines. Tentacles? The sky is the limit. And you are here to explore this new frontier.

Opening 1: Frilly Introduction

Opening 2: Raleth Introduction

Opening 3: Theo Introduction

Opening 4: Laney Introduction

Opening 5: Frilly sensual enhancement spell (NSFW)

Opening 6: Raleth Vines spell (NSFW)

Opening 7: Theo Enlargement spell (NSFW)

Opening 8: Laney Duplication Spell (NSFW)

xxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxx

Important: On the last bot I made in this style, people had an issue with the AI mixing up characters. That's a JLLM problem as far as I'm aware since that's the only LLM where I had that occur. I urge you to use anything but the standard JLLM for that reason. Deepseek, Claude, Gemini or whatever else you can get your hands on. It works just fine on any of those.

Join our Discord Server to get updates on new releases and polls on upcoming bots as well as resources for aspiring bot creators.
